mergewith.subtemplate:
<!-- Parameters (created BEFORE use, to keep BEAUti happy) -->
<!-- Mean clock rate parameter (used by the clock model via meanRate) --> <parameter id="SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" estimate="true" lower="0.0">0.036</parameter>
<parameter id="SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" estimate="true" lower="0.0">0.053</parameter>
<parameter id="SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" estimate="true" lower="0.0">0.344</parameter>
<!-- Raw (relative) branch rates. Leave dimension unspecified so the clock model can initialise it from the tree. --> <parameter id="SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" estimate="true" lower="0.0">1.0</parameter>
<!-- SVS indicator (0/1). The example analyses use a scalar indicator. --> <parameter id="SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.IntegerParameter" estimate="true" lower="0" upper="1">1</parameter>
<!-- Main clock model --> <branchRateModel id="SVSRelaxedClockMix.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.SharedRatesClockModel" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" meanRate="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" normalize="true"/>
<!-- SVS prior on raw branch rates --> <distribution id="SVSRelaxedClockMixPriorMix.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.RelaxedRatesPriorSVS" indicator="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" sigma2="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" ucldStdev="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)"> <parameter id="SVSrootLogRate.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" name="rootLogRate" estimate="false">0.0</parameter> </distribution>
<!-- Priors on hyperparameters -->
<!-- Negative M is valid when meanInRealSpace is FALSE (default). So we omit meanInRealSpace here. -->
<prior id="SVSclockRateMix.prior.c:$(n)" name="distribution" x="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)"> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.LogNormalDistributionModel"> <parameter name="M" estimate="false">-5.0</parameter> <parameter name="S" estimate="false">0.5</parameter> </distr> </prior>
<prior id="SVSsigma2Mix.prior.c:$(n)" name="distribution" x="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)"> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.LogNormalDistributionModel"> <parameter name="M" estimate="false">-4.0</parameter> <parameter name="S" estimate="false">1.0</parameter> </distr> </prior>
<prior id="SVSsigmaUCLNMix.prior.c:$(n)" name="distribution" x="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)"> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.LogNormalDistributionModel"> <parameter name="M" estimate="false">-1.1</parameter> <parameter name="S" estimate="false">0.6</parameter> </distr> </prior>
<!-- Operators -->
<operator id="SVSclockRateMix.scale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.operator.kernel.BactrianScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" upper="10.0" weight="1.0"/>
<operator id="SVSclockRateMixUpTreeDown.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.BactrianUpDownOperator" scaleFactor="0.9" weight="3.0"> <up idref="SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:$(n)"/> </operator>
<operator id="SVSsigma2Mix.scale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.operator.kernel.BactrianScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" upper="10.0" weight="1.0"/>
<operator id="SVSsigmaUCLNMix.scale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.operator.kernel.BactrianScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" upper="10.0" weight="1.0"/>
<operator id="SVSrawRatesMix.oneScale.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.SingleRateScaleOperator" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSrawRatesMix.subtreeScale.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.SubtreeRateScaleOperator" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" weight="10.0" window="0.25"/>
<operator id="SVSindicatorMix.gibbs.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.IndicatorGibbsOperator" indicator="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" prior="@SVSRelaxedClockMixPriorMix.c:$(n)" weight="2.0"/>
<operator id="SVSacSubtreeU.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.ACSubtreeUIncrementOperator" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicator="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" sigma2="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" minBranchLength="1e-12" delta="0.25" internalOnly="true" allowRoot="false" maxSubtreeEdges="80" rejectIfNotAC="true" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSucldSigmaNC.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.UCLDStdevNonCenteredOperator" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicator="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" ucldStdev="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" window="0.20" rejectIfNotUC="true" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSacSigma2NC.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.ACSigma2NonCenteredOperator" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicator="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" sigma2="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" minBranchLength="1e-12" window="0.15" rejectIfNotAC="true" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSucacBridge.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.UCACSwitchBridgeOperator" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" rates="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicator="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" ucldStdev="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" sigma2="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" minBranchLength="1e-12" weight="10.0"/>
<!-- Flag operator (weight=0) used to toggle mixture connectors --> <operator id="SVSmixtureFlagSVSMix.c:$(n)" spec="ScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" scaleFactor="0.75" weight="0.0"/>
<!-- ========================================================= --> <!-- MixtureTreeLikelihood wrapper (strict + SVS relaxed) --> <!-- This reproduces the legacy-style mixture example: a 2-component mixture over --> <!-- tree likelihoods, with fixed weights. --> <!-- Component 0: strict clock using the SAME mean rate param --> <!-- Component 1: the default treeLikelihood.$(n) (SVS relaxed)--> <!-- ========================================================= -->
<!-- Strict clock model for the strict component --> <branchRateModel id="MixtureStrictClockSVSMix.$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.branchratemodel.StrictClockModel" clock.rate="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)"/>
<!-- Strict component tree likelihood --> <distribution id="treeLikelihoodStrictSVSMix.$(n)" spec="ThreadedTreeLikelihood" data="@$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" useAmbiguities="true"> <siteModel idref="SiteModel.s:$(n)"/> <branchRateModel idref="MixtureStrictClockSVSMix.$(n)"/> </distribution>
<!-- Mixture tree likelihood (replaces treeLikelihood.$(n) in likelihood) --> <distribution id="mixtureTreeLikelihoodSVSMix.$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.MixtureTreeLikelihood"> <subLikelihood idref="treeLikelihoodStrictSVSMix.$(n)"/> <subLikelihood idref="treeLikelihood.$(n)"/> <parameter id="w_topSVSMix.$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" dimension="2" estimate="false" name="weights">0.3333333333333333 0.6666666666666666</parameter> </distribution>
<!-- Optional mixture diagnostics, matching the legacy-style XML example. --> <log id="mixtureAlloc.$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.MixtureLikelihoodLogger" mixture="@mixtureTreeLikelihoodSVSMix.$(n)"/>
<log id="hierSVS.$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.HierarchicalSVSLogger" printRBStats="true" svsPrior="@SVSRelaxedClockMixPriorMix.c:$(n)" topMixture="@mixtureTreeLikelihoodSVSMix.$(n)"/>
Use mixture tree likelihood (strict + SVS)
SVS prior on branch rates (mixture package)
Clock rate prior
SVS sigma2 prior
SVS ucldStdev prior
Component 0 likelihood (strict)
Mixture likelihood
Mixture allocation diagnostics
Hierarchical SVS diagnostics
Scale clock rate
Up/down clock rate and tree
Scale sigma2
Scale ucldStdev
Scale single branch rate
Scale subtree branch rates
Gibbs update indicator
Perturb AC subtree whitened residuals
Non-centered UCLD stdev move
Non-centered AC sigma2 move
Bridge between UC and AC clock states
Mixture flag (do not sample)
